title: Intuitive Surgical stock slips on slowing growth of bariatric surgeries during 2Q
text: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) shares slipped on weaker demand for bariatric surgeries during the second quarter despite outperforming the Street's expectations on profit and sales.
